zh.Home, Berwickshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭貝維其可爾霍米
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Home 1st Lord Home於1428年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾霍米時，他的父親Alexander Home 1st Lord Home20歲，母親Lady Marion Lauder11425歲。他於1448年2月2日與Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1468年7月30日在英國蘇格蘭素斯 藍納可爾藍納可享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Home 1st Lord Home于1428年出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾霍米时，他的父亲Alexander Home 1st Lord Home20岁，母亲Lady Marion Lauder11425岁。他于1448年2月2日与Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1468年7月30日在英国苏格兰素斯 藍納可爾藍納可享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Home
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Hume  .

English: habitational name from Home in Clifton on Teme or in Feckenham (Worcestershire) or from a minor place similarly named, a variant of Hamm (from Middle English ham(me), with rounding of the vowel before the nasal consonant to give hom(me)).

variants.name: Hume
meanings: Scottish (Lowlands) and northern English: variant of Hulme , with loss of l before the bilabial consonant /m/, as in the vocabulary word calm. See Holm and Home .

Scottish: habitational name either from the barony of Home or from Hume (or Home) in Berwickshire, from which the barony took its name. The placename derives from Old English hōum, dative plural form of hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) have held the Earldom of Home since 1605.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Home 1st Lord Home was born in 1428, in Home, Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, was 20 and his mother, Lady Marion Lauder, was 11425. He married Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn on 2 February 1448, in Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 30 July 1468, in Lanark, South Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Home 1st Lord Home est né en 1428, à Home, Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Marion Lauder, avait 11425 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn le 2 février 1448, à Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 30 juillet 1468, à Lanark, South Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Home 1st Lord Homeが1428年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアホーメで生まれた時，父Alexander Home 1st Lord Homeは20歳，母Lady Marion Lauderは11425歳であった。1448年2月2日にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアでAgnes Elizabeth Hepburnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1468年7月30日にイギリススコットランドソウス ラナルクシュアイアラナルクで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Home 1st Lord Home(이)가 1428년 스컷랜드 버윅실르 홈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Home 1st Lord Home(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Marion Lauder(은)는 11425세였다. 그는 1448년 2월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르에서 Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1468년 7월 30일 영국 스코틀랜드 소우스 랜아르크실르 랜아르크에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn em 2 de fevereiro de 1448, em Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Home 1st Lord Home родился в 1428 г. в местности хом, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Home 1st Lord Home было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marion Lauder, 11425. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn 2 февраля 1448 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 30 июля 1468 г. в местности ланарк, соут ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.
